heading: Governing body
label: 151505 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)151505(a)36:2006., , §§ 6, 7, .Aug. 9, 1982Pub. L. 97–23196 Stat. 257151505(b)36:2007.The words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” in 36:2006 and “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States wherein it is incorporated” in 36:2007 are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)151505(a)36:2006., , §§ 6, 7, .Aug. 9, 1982Pub. L. 97–23196 Stat. 257151505(b)36:2007.The words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” in 36:2006 and “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States wherein it is incorporated” in 36:2007 are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Board of Directors
children.label: a .—Board of Directors
children.text: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Officers
children.label: b .—Officers
children.text: The officers and the election of the officers are as provided in the articles of incorporation.
